Income Tax Calculator

Estimate salaried income tax for FY 2025-26 using both regimes, including standard deduction and basic rebate-style relief. Excludes surcharge and special-rate income.

How To Use This Tool

  1. Enter the values required by the income tax calculator, such as amount, rate, duration, or other key inputs.
  2. Adjust sliders or fields to compare different scenarios and review the live result cards.
  3. Use the output as a planning estimate, then compare it with related tools for a fuller decision.

Example tax comparison

Enter an annual income such as Rs 12,00,000, review deductions if applicable, and compare the estimated old and new regime tax side by side before making a planning decision.

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I use the income tax calculator?

Open the tool, enter the required inputs, and review the live result section. The how-to steps and example on this page show the fastest way to get a useful output.

Is the income tax calculator free to use?

Yes. This income tax calculator is designed as a free online utility on ToolHub India. You can also use the related internal links to compare other tools in the same category.
